findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'mark piazza | manager, pipeline compliance and r&d colonial pipeline company o. ...' (3x).

findings.description: North Carolina State Seal image missing from HTML rendering of the DEQ letter's first page
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 displays the official North Carolina state seal at the top center of the page between the header text. The HTML rendering omits this seal entirely, showing only the text 'NORTH CAROLINA' and 'Environmental Quality'.

findings.description: David Miller's handwritten signature missing from HTML rendering of DEQ letter page two
findings.evidence: PDF shows a handwritten signature above the printed text 'David Miller / State Mining Engineer' on the letter's signature block. The HTML rendering shows only the text 'for / David Miller / State Mining Engineer' with no signature image.

findings.description: North Carolina state seal image missing from Rep. Dennis Riddell's email signature block
findings.evidence: PDF shows a circular NC state seal image below Rep. Riddell's contact information in his email signature block (Rm 416A, Legislative Office Building). The HTML rendering omits this seal, showing only the text portion of the signature block.

findings.description: Colonial Pipeline Company circular logo missing from the CPC formal letter letterhead
findings.evidence: PDF displays a circular 'CD' logo at the top of the Colonial Pipeline Company letter to Ms. Judy Wehner dated August 6, 2020. The HTML rendering shows only the text heading 'Colonial Pipeline Company' without the logo mark.

findings.description: Mark Piazza's handwritten signature missing from the Colonial Pipeline Company letter
findings.evidence: PDF shows Mark Piazza's handwritten signature above his printed name and title 'Manager, Pipeline Compliance and R&D' on the CPC letter's signature page. The HTML rendering shows only the printed text 'Sincerely, / Mark Piazza / Manager, Pipeline Compliance and R&D' with no signature image.

findings.description: Exhibit 1A and Exhibit 1B site plan maps (PDF pages 16-17) are substantive images showing the proposed Emergency Access Route intersecting Quakenbush Road. The HTML includes caption text for both exhibits but contains no tags for the actual map images.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 16 contains a detailed quarry site plan labeled 'Exhibit 1A. Location of the Proposed Emergency Access Route Intersecting Quakenbush Road'. PDF page 17 contains a zoomed-in site plan labeled 'Exhibit 1B'. The HTML has only text captions: '

Exhibit 1A. Location of the Proposed Emergency Access Route Intersecting Quakenbush Road

' with no corresponding elements.

findings.description: Email address for Jane Lea Hicks is altered in the HTML. The PDF reads 'janeleahicks@gmail.com' (consistent with the name 'Jane Lea Hicks') but the HTML renders it as 'janelecahicks@gmail.com' (letter 'a' changed to 'c').
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 CC line: 'Jane Lea Hicks '. HTML: 'janelecahicks@gmail.com'
